Privacy Policy

For Silara Enterprises In April 2026

Our Enterprise

("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data for our business.

Data Collection

We collect your name, phone number, and delivery address to fulfill orders and provide customer support via WhatsApp.

WhatsApp Communication

By sharing your phone number, you agree to receive order updates, tracking details, and marketing messages via WhatsApp Business.

Data Sharing

We share your data with Meta (for WhatsApp) and logistics partners (for delivery), but never sell it to third parties.

Your Rights

You may opt-out of marketing messages at any time by replying "STOP" to any WhatsApp message we send. To request data deletion, contact us at contact@silara.org.

Legal Compliance

We comply with Indian data protection laws and relevant international guidelines for our export markets.

  • Order at +91 7439285007

Looking to import next generation foods? Reach us at contact@silara.org for any feedback or inquiries.
